'''zada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:long/lengthy|long/lengthy]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:long/lengthy|long/lengthy]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zadate|zadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zadatesher|zadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadatesherĂ«m|zadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zadatero|zadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zadateshĂ«|zadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadateshĂ«m|zadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizadatero|gokizadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizadateshĂ«|gokizadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadateshĂ«m|gokizadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozadankerom|gozadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozadankeshĂ«|gozadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozadankeshĂ«m|gozadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozadankeya|gozadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zadaterom|zadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadatemu|zadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zadateya|zadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizadaterom|gokizadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadatemu|gokizadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizadateya|gokizadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zadadate|zadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zadadatesher|zadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadadatesherĂ«m|zadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zadadatero|zadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zadadateshĂ«|zadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadadateshĂ«m|zadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizadadatero|gokizadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizadadateshĂ«|gokizadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadadateshĂ«m|gokizadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozadadankerom|gozadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozadadankeshĂ«|gozadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozadadankeshĂ«m|gozadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozadadankeya|gozadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zadadaterom|zadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadadatemu|zadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zadadateya|zadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizadadaterom|gokizadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadadatemu|gokizadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizadadateya|gokizadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠdĂŠte|zĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠdĂŠtesher|zĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠdĂŠtero|zĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdĂŠtero|gokizĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠdĂŠterom|zĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠdĂŠtemu|zĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠdĂŠteya|zĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdĂŠterom|gokizĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠdĂŠteya|gokizĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafdafte|zafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafdaftesher|zafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafdaftesherĂ«m|zafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafdaftero|zafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafdafteshĂ«|zafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafdafteshĂ«m|zafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafdaftero|gokizafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafdafteshĂ«|gokizafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafdafteshĂ«m|gokizafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafdafnkerom|gozafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafdafnkeshĂ«|gozafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafdafnkeshĂ«m|gozafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafdafnkeya|gozafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafdafterom|zafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafdaftemu|zafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafdafteya|zafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafdafterom|gokizafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafdaftemu|gokizafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafdafteya|gokizafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
